reviews.review_description: I have my purchasing protected by a 4 digit code to ensure I don't accidentally buy something. Even though I selected the free trial, I somehow got charged for this app!   I haven't played this yet, but due to the dishonesty,  i already don't like it

Brands itself as a "VR Fitness Game", and boy are they correct about one of those words. The most intense workout I got was laughing when the AI assistant answered my question with an OpenAI API error message. The games on the other hand are baffling both in ideas and execution. For the former, I really don't know who thought a match 3 puzzle game would constitute fitness, but it doesn't (and what's with the intense music?? It's a flower themed match 3 puzzle game not the apocalypse??). Nor does ping pong target practice, nor moving a circle carefully over a wire, honestly the most intense exercise was probably the "game" that was effectively just squeegeeing a window repeatedly. These games are so forgettable I can't think of what the others are, and I played them 10 minutes ago. But none of them come close to being a workout. As for the execution, well, I have to congratulate the team, I don't think I've played a more poorly coded VR game in my life. The framerate was miserable, framedrops were extremely frequent, the physics in the ball game were laughable (I swear every rebound sent at an rng angle), none of the songs loop properly in the slightest, at one point the song just didn't even start until 3 minutes into a game, and finally as mentioned before, their AI Assistant was reading out an OpenAI API error message for 20 minutes until I closed the "game".

I have no idea of anything else Yur does, seems they do have some faithful community members so I can only assume they are trying and maybe their other products are good for fitness/tracking (apparently they have some beatsaber mod?). But then again, I check their discord and their support channel is dead outside of a few unresponded requests about how they can't cancel their membership or get a refund.

It is so bad that I had to uninstall this game and it was so bad that wen I played this my $1000000000000000000000 pc broke because I thought it was this game Oner if your reading this fix the fudgeing 
game furry


Wen I got the supporter it was a skam
What's the gag here? I used to have a fitness tracker for VR, now I'm on a beach punching flowers. Entertaining for sure, but absurd to say the least. What happened to the fitness tracker?

developer_response.body: The fitness tracker is available on select platforms. Let's chat further on Discord: https://yur.chat to join.

reviews.review_description: Do you have to put a code in each time? I did. Couldn't find a tutorial. I deleted

developer_response.body: The tutorial criticism has been taken seriously and we have patched that to include a breakdown of what the watch is for and can validate that there's no need to input the code multiple times.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded the game last night. Unfortunately It keeps crashing every time I try to use it. Super frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Hey Sonja, we apologize for the inconvenience and understand your frustration. We are aware of the issue and are working hard to patch it as soon as possible. Rest assured that this platform will receive regular updates over the long haul. You can always message us directly via email at support@yur.energy or via Discord join here: https://yur.chat

UPDATE: We're fairly certain we have patched the bug which was related to Leaderboards.

reviews.review_title: incredibly fun with a potential for much
reviews.review_description: i lost track of time playing the games and got a longer workout than I expected.  the games are challenging to learn but fun once i got into the flow!
I know it’s early access but really liking the games so far and the integration into an app to track my fitness! I see the potential here and can’t wait to see YUR World develop!

This has been a game changer for staying in shape during the cold winters. I love how YUR connects with my other platforms like Discord and other fitness apps, which makes it super easy to build my daily fitness habits.

Highly recommend checking it out! See ya there

Potential is the key word here. At first glance currently, this VR fitness experience seems elementary, and currently I might be inclined to agree, but I see quite a lot of potential in the infrastructure YUR has implemented in YUR World so far. Even with the experience "Reaction", I had quite a lot of fun playing it, and am hopeful that YUR will continue to build and elaborate on said experience. Expect to see my name in at least Reaction's leaderboards above yours.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words and support! We're glad to hear that you've been enjoying our calorie tracker on PC and that the Quest app is meeting your expectations. We'll continue to work hard to improve the app and make it even better. Thanks again for choosing YUR! You can always message us directly via email at support@yur.energy or via our community: https://yur.chat

reviews.review_description: Awesome for it to be finally back. Surprisingly good for a work in progress.

I've been using the calorie tracker by YUR on PC for nearly a thousand hours now and I just love how YUR makes working out in VR so fun, so when I saw that they released an app on quest I just had to try it and it's great! I can certainly see this quickly rising to the top of the fitness section on the quest store. Great job, devs!

reviews.review_title: Still charging for a cancelled subscript
reviews.review_description: 07/03/2023 -Now 2 months later, after my initial review and 2 emails I sent to your company and a chat on your webpage, and I'm still being charged! I've cancelled AGAIN!! because somehow I end up re-subscribed.  Why would you still be charging me for a subscription I cancelled inside the trial period? My trial ended 2/18/23 and you started charging me on 2/20/23….up until now. No notification for March but tonight I just rcvd an email thanking me for my payment. I need someone to contact me ASAP.

developer_response.body: First off we're so sorry for this. We own this issue and will issue you a full refund. We're working with Meta directly on this, it's possibly a bug with their API as well. Please email us directly at hi@yur.energy regardless so we can remedy this immediately and make it right.

reviews.review_description: It's really stupid to ask me for an app on my phones

reviews.review_title: No excersise but good game and  no sweat
reviews.review_description: I see no excersise but I love the graphics of the game and the beautifull landscape

This is more than a fitness tracker. Tracker part is free with some simpele games. If you want more a paid licnse is needed. I need only the tracker part ( for now that is 😉) .
Had some issues with my installation, which are solved now. I was pleasently surprised by the Quick response and cooperation from the support/development team. This is also a reason for giving 5 stars.
I think a very nice future lies ahead for YUR and us users and fitness fanaticus!

YUR World adds a creative twist to my daily workout through its several creative workout modes and customization options. The workouts are highly interactive, and I appreciate being able to customize my workouts to better fit my needs. (the YUR mobile app also makes it easy to track my progress and set goals, well designed!)

Just no. I bought the pass for this but all it keeps saying is no Internet connection. I have very good Internet and tried what I could to get it working. Nothing has worked. I tried reaching out to support on their website and on their discord yet not one person has gotten back to me. Obviously they really don't care about the people who buy this as long as they can get their money and dip. If I could submit a 100 complaints to stop anyone from getting this app and buying the pass, I would. Unfortunately, this is probably also going to get passed over because they care nothing for their customers. If I could give it 0 stars, I would.

developer_response.body: We are sorry for any inconvenience caused by our delay in response. We want to make things right by processing your refund promptly. Kindly send us an email at hi@yur.energy so we can assist you in resolving this matter. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

reviews.review_description: It’s a great game and it helps with fitness and I love all the mechanics. I recommend this game to everyone

Nope, not a fitness or workout app. I crushed bugs with minimal movement, hit a ball that was moving very slowly and glitched as it moved, moved flowers with barely any effort. I burned barely 8 calories playing 3 games for almost 15 mins 🤷🏻‍♀️

developer_response.body: Thanks for the candid feedback, we're shipping an update patch in the coming weeks with significant steps up in performance. Our foundation is built in Unreal Engine which as fast as we've been working still has a few platform features we're not supporting that close the gaps between what you'd like to see and the performance you felt.
